category_sources: source_facts.description says Regular expression language; official docs at https://pomsky-lang.org/docs/ describe Pomsky as a next-level regular expression language.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and docs use Pomsky: https://pomsky-lang.org/ and https://pomsky-lang.org/docs/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pomsky-lang/pomsky, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a regular expression language; official homepage says Pomsky is transpiled to normal regular expressions and offers language reference docs.
